title: Crystal Client Totem Cape
description: makes the totem of undying into a custom totem cape!
body:
## Totem Cape
**Turns the totem of undying into a custom [crystal client](https://modrinth.com/modpack/crystal-client) totem cape that looks like you have a cape!!**

Support Crystal Client on [Patreon!](https://www.patreon.com/c/CrystalClient7/membership)
